description: An annotations output format result containing validity alongside collected annotations.

valid.description: Whether the instance validated successfully against the schema.

annotations.description: Annotation results collected during evaluation. Each item represents a single annotation produced by a keyword.

keyword.description: The keyword that produced this annotation.

instanceLocation.description: The location of the instance being annotated, as a JSON Pointer.

keywordLocation.description: The location of the keyword that produced this annotation, as a JSON Pointer or URI.

annotation.description: The annotation value produced by the keyword.
